Entries.TextOriginal: タルさま さすがですわ！[NL]たこやきを [36][03]コも おあつめになって！[3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Taru-sama, how wonderful! You have collected [36][03] pieces of Takoyaki![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: どのアイテムになさいますか？[3F]
さすが タルさま おめがたかいですわ！[3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: As expected of Taru-sama, you have excellent taste![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: スクラッチゲームを なさいますか？[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Would you like to play a[NL]Scratch Game?[3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Would you like to play a Scratch Game?[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: タルさま がんばってくださいね！[NL]ミモラは いつまでも タルさまの みかたですわ！[33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Good luck, Taru-sama![NL]Mimora is always on your[NL]side![33][3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Good luck, Taru-sama! Mimora will always be on your side![33][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: タルさま どうしたんですの？[3F]
ありがとうございました[NL]スクラッチカードを[36] まい さしあげますわ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Thank you very much! I[NL]will give you [36][02] Scratch[NL]Cards![3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Thank you very much! I will give you [36] Scratch Cards![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: 6コマのうち 3コマを けずってください[NL]おなじものが そろえば そのアイテムを さしあげ[NL]ますわ！ がんばってくださいね！[3C][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Scratch off 3 of the 6[NL]panels. If you match 3 of[NL]the same item,[3C][3D]you win it! Good luck![3C][3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Please scratch off 3 of the 6 panels. If you match 3 of the same item, I will give you that item! Good luck![3C][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: タルさま そのアイテムは もう じゅうぶん[NL]もっておいでですわ…[3C][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Taru-sama, you already[NL]have enough of that[NL]item...[3C][3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Taru-sama, you already have enough of that item...[3C][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: タルさま たこやきが たりませんわ…[NL]いくら タルさまの たのみでも こればかりは[NL]おゆずりするわけには まいりませんわ…[3C][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Taru-sama, you do not[NL]have enough Takoyaki.[NL]Even for you,[3C][3D]I cannot give it away for[NL]free...[3C][3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Taru-sama, I'm afraid you don't have enough Takoyaki... No matter how much you ask, Taru-sama, I simply cannot give this one away...[3C][3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: あっ！ タルさまは とっても ラッキーですわ！！[NL]ただいま サーバスセールちゅうですので[NL]スクラッチカードを いつもの2ばい[3C][3D]なんと [36] も さしあげてしまいますわ！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Ah! You are very lucky,[NL]Taru-sama!! We are having[NL]a Service Sale,[3C][3D]so I will give you twice[NL]the usual cards! You get[NL][36][02]![3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Oh! Taru-sama, you are very lucky!! We are currently running a special sale, so I will give you twice the usual amount of Scratch Cards — a whopping [36]![3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: タルさま… たこやきを おあつめにならないと[NL]アイテムを おわけすることが できませんわ…[NL]どんどん あつめてくださいね゜[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Taru-sama... I cannot[NL]give you items if you do[NL]not collect[3C][3D]Takoyaki. Please get some[NL]more.[3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Taru-sama... I cannot share items with you if you haven't collected Takoyaki... Please keep collecting more and more.[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: ありがとうございます゜ スクラッチカードを…[3C][3D]あら タルさま゜スクラッチカードが もう[NL]いっぱいですわ… 99まいしか もてませんから[NL]どんどん つかってくださいね゜[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: Thank you! Here are your[NL]Scratch Cards...[3C][3D]Oh, Taru-sama. You[NL]already have 99 cards![NL]Please use some.[3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: Thank you very much. Here are your Scratch Cards...[3C][3D]Oh my, Taru-sama. You already have a full hand of Scratch Cards... You can only hold 99, so please use them up.[3F]

Entries.TextOriginal: スクラッチカードは 99まいしか もてませんので[NL]どんどん つかってくださいね！[3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: You can only hold 99[NL]Scratch Cards, so please[NL]use them![3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: You can only hold 99 Scratch Cards, so please use them up![3F]
